name: AI-Powered Tutoring Platform
header: AI-Driven Tutoring Platform | Full-Stack Software Engineering, Gemini API Integration 2025
bullets: Designed and built a tutoring platform with end-to-end workflows for course content, quizzes, and user progress tracking.
Integrated Gemini API calls to generate adaptive questions and explanations, implementing error-handling, caching, and request-throughput controls.
Developed backend services using Next.js, Prisma, and PostgreSQL, including RESTful API routes, schema design, and secure authentication.
